mnemonics.title: CDP记忆
mnemonics.content: CDP = Coprocessor Data Processing - 'Do' operations directly in coprocessor without memory

mnemonics.title: LDC/STC记忆
mnemonics.content: LDC = Load to Coprocessor (Memory→Coproc), STC = Store from Coprocessor (Coproc→Memory). Think: L for Load→, S for Store←

mnemonics.title: MRC/MCR记忆
mnemonics.content: MRC = Move to Register from Coprocessor (Coproc→ARM), MCR = Move to Coprocessor from Register (ARM→Coproc). R in MRC = Register (ARM)

acronyms.usage: Direct data operations on coprocessor registers without memory access
Transfer data from memory to coprocessor register
Transfer data from coprocessor register to memory

acronyms.expansion: Move from Coprocessor to ARM register
acronyms.usage: Transfer coprocessor data to main ARM processor register

acronyms.expansion: Move from ARM register to Coprocessor
acronyms.usage: Transfer ARM processor data to coprocessor register
Parallel processing technique used in NEON coprocessor
Hardware floating-point unit in ARM processors
Advanced SIMD coprocessor for multimedia and DSP applications
Controls MMU, cache, and system configuration in ARM

visualTips.visualization: Draw two boxes: ARM CPU and Coprocessor. Arrows show: CDP (within coprobox), LDC/STC (memory↔coproc), MRC (coproc→ARM), MCR (ARM→coproc)
Think of 16 slots CP0-CP15 in a row. CP15 is special (system control), CP10/CP11 = VFP, CP8 = DSP. Fill slots like a parking lot.
Triangle diagram: CDP at top (internal coproc ops), LDC/STC at bottom-left (memory↔coproc), MRC/MCR at bottom-right (ARM↔coproc)

analogies.analogy: Like having a specialist doctor (cardiologist) in a hospital - the general physician (CPU) handles overall care but refers to specialist for specific problems, getting faster, better treatment.
CDP is like a specialist doing paperwork in their own office - no need to go to the main desk (memory).
SIMD is like one teacher teaching 8 students at once instead of 8 teachers teaching 8 students individually - same effort, more output.
VFP is like a scientific calculator (precision), NEON is like a multi-channel audio mixer (parallel processing). Both calculate but optimized differently.
